positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration featuring a whimsical collection of forest flora and magical woodland creatures. The composition is a symmetrical, centralized arrangement suitable for a t-shirt print, showcasing stylized ferns, glowing mushrooms, gentle deer silhouettes, and small, playful woodland sprites interacting harmoniously. Use a sophisticated linework aesthetic with deep indigo, earthy emerald, gold metallic highlights, and cream accents. The style should evoke detailed, modern botanical engraving mixed with Art Nouveau fantasy illustration. Clean, strong outlines, visible print texture, perfect symmetry, central focus.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, photorealism, cartoon, messy, cluttered, amateur, poor composition
